CASINO IGT LEADERBOARD - 7.10.25 (ID: ALL_2979) 

 

  1. Description of Promotion 

This promotion is offered by FBG Enterprises Opco, LLC (“Fanatics Casino”). Select Fanatics Casino customers who opt-in and participate in this Promotion are eligible to join a “Leaderboard” and compete for Casino Credit prizes (each customer who opts in and participates is a “Player”).   1. Promotional Period 

This Promotion begins at 12:00 a.m. ET on July 10, 2025, and ends at 11:59 p.m. ET on July 13, 2025 (the “Promotional Period”). 

 

  1. Eligibility 

This Promotion is only available to select customers with an active and verified Fanatics Casino account (“Account”) in Michigan, New Jersey, or Pennsylvania. To participate in this Promotion, (i) you must be 21 years of age or older; (ii) you must be physically present in one of the foregoing states to use your Account; and (iii) you must receive the invitation to participate in this Promotion directly from Fanatics Casino (this offer cannot be shared or forwarded). Promotion eligibility is subject to any Account wagering restrictions/limits and is determined by Fanatics Casino at its discretion on an ongoing basis. Individuals on any involuntary state gambling exclusion list, state gambling self-exclusion list, and/or self-exclusion list for any Fanatics subsidiary are ineligible to participate in the Promotion.   

 

  1. Action Required 

To participate in this Promotion and be added to the Leaderboard, you must opt-in via the promotional widget within any Eligible Game. You only need to opt in once to be eligible for the Promotion. Each Player’s position on the Leaderboard will be determined by the total number of points earned during the Promotional Period (“Score”). To receive a Leaderboard Prize, you must rank between positions 1 and 204 on the leaderboard at the end of the Promotional Period. Each cash wager placed on any Eligible Game during the Promotional Period which results in a win, will result in points gained on the leaderboard using the win multiplier mechanic: Win/Bet *100 (ex: $1/0.20cent*100 = 500 points). ANY GAMEPLAY PRIOR TO OPTING IN, EVEN IF DURING THE PROMOTIONAL PERIOD, WILL NOT COUNT TOWARDS THE PLAYER’S SCORE. 

 

Each participating state will have a separate opt-in and Leaderboard. You may opt-in and participate in this Promotion in multiple states, but you must opt-in in each jurisdiction you wish to participate in, and your wagers will only count toward your Score in the state they are placed in. (For example: If you opt-in in State A, only wagers placed in State A will count toward your Score. You may also opt-in and participate in State B and State C, but wagers placed in each state will only count toward the Score for the state they are placed in). 

 

Throughout the Promotional Period, Players may move up or down the Leaderboard as their Score changes. The Leaderboard will be available to view by clicking the Leaderboard promo tile within an Eligible Game. Note that displayed Scores may be delayed by up to 60 minutes, but the Leaderboard will show when the Leaderboard was last updated. 

 

  1. Claiming Promotional Offer 

At the conclusion of the Promotional Period, the top two hundred four (204) Players with the highest Scores will each be eligible to receive the Casino Credit Prizes set forth below (each, a “Prize”). In the event of a tie, the applicable Prize(s) will be distributed equally amongst the eligible tied Players (e.g., if two players tie for second place, the second and third place Prizes will be combined and distributed equally; if three players tie for second place, the second, third, and fourth Prizes will be combined and distributed equally, etc).

ASSOCIATED WITH PRIZE ACCEPTANCE (IF APPLICABLE) BEFORE ANY PLAYER WILL BE CONFIRMED AS A WINNER AND RECEIVE A PRIZE. In the event a potential winner declines a Prize or is deemed ineligible to receive a Prize, Fanatics Casino may, in its sole discretion, select an alternate potential winner for that Prize. 

 

PRIZES: 

The total prize amount available for this Promotion is $75,000 in Casino Credit. There is $25,000 in Casino Credit Prizes available for each jurisdiction (Michigan, New Jersey, and Pennsylvania)  as follows: 

 

  • 1st Place: $10,000 Casino Credit 
  • 2nd - 3rd Place: $2,500 Casino Credit 
  • 4th - 204th Place: $50 Casino Credit 

 

  1. Casino Credit (Rewards) Terms 
  • Casino Credit is a type of bonus issued by Fanatics Casino that is applied to casino wagers in lieu of (or in combination with) deposited funds (cash). 
  • You can view your Casino Credit balance in your Account or in the Rewards carousel in the App. 
  • If you have Casino Credit available to use, it will automatically be applied to eligible casino wagers before (or in combination with) any deposited funds (cash).   
    1. As an example, if you have $20 in deposited funds (cash) and $10 in Casino Credit in your Account and you place a $10 wager that wins $8, the entire $10 Casino Credit will be applied to your wager (making your Casino Credit balance $0), and the $8 in winnings will be added to your cash balance (making it $28). Using the same example but with a $5 wager instead of $10, your Casino Credit balance will be $5, and your cash balance will be $28. 
  • Casino Credit can be combined with deposited funds (cash) to place a wager. 
    1. As an example, if you have $20 in cash and $10 in Casino Credit in your Account and you wager $15 on a blackjack hand, $10 in Casino Credit and $5 in cash will be applied to that wager. 
  • Casino Credit must be played through one time. 
  • Any payouts from bets placed with Casino Credit will be added to your cash balance.  
  • You do not need to use all of your Casino Credit as a single wager. Your wager amount will dictate how much Casino Credit is applied (e.g., if you have $10 in Casino Credit and place a $2 wager, $2 of Casino Credit will be applied to that wager). 
  • If Casino Credit is used on a blackjack hand that results in a push, the value of the Casino Credit will be added to your cash balance in your Account (e.g., if you have and wager $5 in Casino Credit on a blackjack hand that results in a push, your Casino Credit balance will be $0, but the $5 stake will be added to your cash balance). 
  • Casino Credit closest to expiration will be applied first. 
  • Casino Credit can be transferred between Fanatics Casino jurisdictions. 
  • Casino Credit cannot be redeemed for or withdrawn as cash at any time. 
  • Casino Credit can only be redeemed online or in-app with a valid Account. 
  • Use of Casino Credit does not count towards qualifying for any other promotional offers, nor can Casino Credit be used in other promotions. 
  • Bets placed using Casino Credit will not earn FanCash. 
  • Casino Credit may not be exchanged, substituted, or transferred. 

 

  1. Eligible Games/Markets/Events 

Only cash bets placed on any IGT slots games qualify for this Promotion. IGT slots games are labeled as such within the game. Use the “search” function within the Fanatics Casino app. for a full list of IGT slots games.
